text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Thanks for the day off!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was able to have a nice long chat with my folks,
and I feel revitalized.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now I should be able to run as well as a
freshly-tuned motorcycle!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll be flying down the track again like usual, so
make sure you do your part too!
